title: erigeron heleniae
intro: Erigeron heleniae, also known as Helen's fleabane or Helen's daisy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to Mexico. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Erigeron heleniae include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues due to its antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Erigeron heleniae can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible natural remedy.
